mandate: Build audit logging service and wire into SMS pipeline at every exit point
keyFindings: The audit_logs table schema (migration 007) matches the AuditLog TypeScript type exactly — no migration needed
The Twilio send step previously discarded the SID return value; capturing it required changing the step to return twilioResponse.sid
Audit writes must never throw — wrapping in try/catch with console.error is the correct pattern for non-critical observability
whatWorked: Creating a single writeAuditLog function with a never-throw contract, then wiring it as independent Inngest steps. Each audit step retries independently from business logic.
whatFailed: Nothing failed. The table schema, type definitions, and pipeline structure were all aligned.
recommendationsForNextAgent: The sms-received.ts file now has audit steps after both escalation paths. Agent B (escalation-herald) should add notification steps AFTER the audit steps in those same paths. The audit-escalated-classification and audit-escalated-safety steps are the landmarks.
spiritContribution: Established the observability foundation. Every SMS pipeline path now leaves a trace in audit_logs.
